AddCacheNodes.clientToken: Ensures idempotency of the API call
AddCacheNodes.type: Cache access type to be added in MasterManaged deployment mode; currently supported values: * BCC: Baidu Cloud Server (BCC); * IDC: Self-built data center
AddCacheNodes.cacheNodes: List of node information to be added; see appendix AddCacheNodeInfo
AddCacheNodes.cacheNodes.config: Node configuration in JSON string format (default): {  "systemConfig": {    "vm.max_map_count": 524288,    "fs.aio-max-nr": 10485760  },  "resourceConfig": {    "requestCpu": 4,    "limitCpu": 16,    "requestMem": "2GiB",    "limitMem": "8GiB"  },  "serviceConfig": {    "min_log_level": 1  }}
AddCacheNodes.cacheNodes.diskInfos: Disk information for the node to join; see appendix DiskInfo. The format field indicates whether to format the disk before joining: when true, the target dev device must be specified; when false, the diskQuotaGiB capacity for the given path must be specified
AddCacheNodes.cacheNodes.deployPath: Deployment path for the cache node service; default is /home/.rapidfs/
AddCacheNodes.cacheNodes.bccInfo: BCC cache node information; see appendix BCCCacheNodeInfo
AddCacheNodes.cacheNodes.idcInfo: IDC cache node information; see appendix IDCCacheNodeInfo
